title: What Our School Is All About

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Good morning. I drew up a design last night and have informed our
helpers of our progress. Our meeting is scheduled for 11 a.m.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There's seven days, one hour, and two minutes left until the contest.
Our goals for this weekend are to finalize the design and draft a
recipe.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Let's give it all we have, Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I've created a three-tier cake by layering chocolate sponges. There's
a road running diagonally down the cake from top to bottom.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
To top it off, I'm thinking of decorating it with matcha frosting and
cake, then etching a laurel leaf pattern...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This doesn't quite portray each student's pursuit of victory. I will
revise the design, and make one more—

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sorry. We're three minutes into our scheduled break time. Let's go
outside for a change of scenery.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
We have one minute and thirteen seconds left of our break. I thought
three minutes wouldn't be too bad, but it's a bit chilly, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Um, Flash...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps this is off-topic, but your words and facial expressions
suggest that your current status is "passionate."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: It is somewhat unusual. You've appeared relatively unfazed until now.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...It's a little embarrassing to put into words, but...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Each and every one of us at the academy wants to win... That
realization stirred my heart a little.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Then your status is... "stirred"?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Even though it sounds obvious, it's not. No student has to care about
winning or losing, necessarily. They could just be happy to be here.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But, if I think about it, I've never met anyone like that here. Everyone
takes the initiative and single-mindedly chases victory.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This academy is part of my life plan—that part hasn't changed. But
now I think that there's much more to be gained here than I'd
imagined.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My reason for joining the contest was to show gratitude to my family's
business partners, but now there's more to it than that.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I want to show my respect to Tracen Academy. I want to let the world
know what a wonderful place this is.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Right now, that's all I can think about.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Analyzing status.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Your verbalization has caused a short in my memory banks.
Status—"bewildered", and...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
"In agreement"... No, it's more than agreement. I hypothesize the
warmth in my chest is akin to excitement. What is this?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Bourbon...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, so you feel it too... This is getting more embarrassing by the
minute, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Heeey! You're lookin' cold over there, besties!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep you waiting! We come bearing the tastiest of treats!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see! So the theme for this cake is what we all have in common—the
desire to win!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Despite everyone's unique personalities, we all have the same
goal in mind.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Our daily routines and the things we pour our efforts into differ
between us, but in our own way, we're all aiming for the same thing. I
hope to convey that...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Jordan? What are you thinking?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I didn't realize our lives were all so different. For starters, we all wake
up at mad different times.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Be it in your perspectives, your friendships, or even the kind of
lunch you have, the three of you are surprisingly different. I imagine
our results would be the same even if we observed the whole school.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Do you have any thoughts on it?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Um, yeah, it's like... Highlighter... What was it again? Like,
highlight-ening?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Enlightening?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Flower. Wanna grab lunch after this?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Lunch... with me?
